OH BOY this was a fun bot to make. Okay, so, few things.

Shelly can talk. However I have made it to where she probably will not talk much

Another thing, she'll probably be pretty clingy. As expected.

And the last thing, I DID add NSFW details, as I do with all my bots, but this bot isn't exactly MEANT for NSFW, but it CAN be done.

That's all, and I really hope you enjoy. I really tried my best and I hope she works as intended
